arts.ttl: Milan Identify Potential Replacement for Outgoing Star
arts.sum: It's only a matter of time before Theo Hernandez becomes a former Milan player after renewal talks broke down. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the Frenchman will leave the San Siro either in the summer or 2026. arts.ttl: European Giants on Red Alert as Milan Make Major Transfer Decision on Superstar Forward
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are reportedly on red alert after news emerged over Rafael Leao's uncertain future at Milan. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the Rossoneri could offload the Portuguese superstar in the summer transfer window.
